bands.label: Excellent
bands.descriptor: Fully developed argumentation, fluent and accurate complex language, very wide vocabulary, almost no noticeable errors.

bands.label: Very Good Academic English
bands.descriptor: Extended support and clear significance of ideas, strong organization, effective complex structures, occasional lexical/collocation lapses.

bands.label: Clearly More Than Adequate
bands.descriptor: Task is addressed with supporting ideas/examples, coherent paragraph flow, mix of simple and complex sentences, minor language lapses.

bands.label: Adequate For University Study
bands.descriptor: Relevant development and logical organization, mostly correct language, frequent error-free sentences, adequate vocabulary for intelligible expression.

bands.label: Doubts About Adequacy
bands.descriptor: Generally relevant but unevenly developed content, limited range with collocation/word-choice issues, simple structures dominate.

bands.label: Not Adequate
bands.descriptor: Task coverage is incomplete or repetitive, organization and paragraph unity break down, frequent grammar/collocation errors impede meaning.

bands.label: Far Below Adequacy
bands.descriptor: Very limited or unclear response, no stable organization, frequent unintelligible language.

bands.label: Insufficient
bands.descriptor: Text is too short to evaluate reliably.
